output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, itertools, math, difflib, statistics, textwrap

# Load files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)
len(quran_data), list(quran_data[0].keys())[:10]

def strip_diacritics(s):
    # Remove tashkeel
    # Combining marks in Arabic range plus some special marks
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    return arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # Normalize hamza and alef forms
    s = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671\u0672\u0673\u0675]', 'ا', s)
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي').replace('ئ', 'ي').replace('ؤ', 'و')
    s = s.replace('ٰ', '')  # dagger alef remove if any
    s = s.replace('ۀ', 'ه')
    # ta marbuta?
    s = s.replace('ة', 'ه')
    # remove tatweel and punctuation
    s = re.sub('[\u0640]', '', s)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

query = "فَلَمَّا اعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ وَهَب"
norm_query = normalize_arabic(query)
matches = []
for v in quran_data:
    norm_text = normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text'])
    if norm_query in norm_text:
        matches.append(v)
matches[:3], len(matches)

snippet = "فَلَمَّا اعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ وَهَب"
candidate = matches[0]['ayah_text']

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # standard dynamic programming for LCS length
    # We'll use normalized forms without diacritics to avoid mismatches
    A = normalize_arabic(a)
    B = normalize_arabic(b)
    n, m = len(A), len(B)
    # Use memory-optimized DP
    prev = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        curr = [0]*(m+1)
        ai = A[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            bj = B[j-1]
            if ai == bj:
                curr[j] = prev[j-1] + 1
            else:
                curr[j] = curr[j-1] if curr[j-1] > prev[j] else prev[j]
        prev = curr
    return prev[m], A, B

lcs_len, A, B = lcs_length(snippet, candidate)
sim = lcs_len / max(1, len(A))
len(A), len(B), lcs_len, sim

content.text: {"correction":"فَلَمَّا اعْتَزَلَهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِنْ دُونِ اللَّهِ وَهَبْنَا لَهُ إِسْحَاقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ ۖ وَكُلًّا جَعَلْنَا نَبِيًّا"}
